name: Party Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry cereals and pretzel sticks to make 9 cups.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the apple juice, Worcestershire sauce, and seasonings.
3. Brush half of the liquid mixture over the dry ingredients and toss to coat.
4. Microwave on high for 3 minutes. Stir, then brush on an additional quarter of the liquid mixture.
5. Transfer the coated cereal mix to a baking dish and bake at 300°F (150°C) for 15-20 minutes. At the 15-minute mark, stir and apply the remaining liquid mixture. Continue cooking for an additional 15 minutes or until the desired crunchiness is reached.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving. Enjoy!
